headline: Is It Too Late To Consider NVIDIA (NVDA) After A 7x Multi Year Surge?
summary: For investors questioning whether NVIDIA's current share price still makes sense, or if expectations have run too far ahead of reality, this article focuses squarely on what you are paying versus what you may be getting. The stock recently closed at US$215.33, with returns of 7.9% over 30 days, 14.0% year to date and 64.0% over the past year, while the last 7 days saw a decline of 4.4%. Recent headlines have continued to spotlight NVIDIA's role in key technology themes, keeping investor...
